ns0:entry.ns0:title: CISOfy/lynis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CISOfy/lynis
Language: shell
Lynis - Security auditing tool for Linux, macOS, and UNIX-based systems. Assists with compliance testing (HIPAA/ISO27001/PCI DSS) and system hardening. Agentless, and installation optional.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill
Language: shell
Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MichaelCade/90DaysOfDevOps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MichaelCade/90DaysOfDevOps
Language: shell
This repository started out as a learning in public project for myself and has now become a structured learning map for many in the community. We have 3 years under our belt covering all things DevOps, including Principles, Processes, Tooling and Use Cases surrounding this vast topic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Steam-Headless/docker-steam-headless
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Steam-Headless/docker-steam-headless
Language: shell
A Headless Steam Docker image supporting NVIDIA GPU and accessible via Web UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: VSCodium/vscodium
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VSCodium/vscodium
Language: shell
binary releases of VS Code without MS branding/telemetry/licensing

ns0:entry.ns0:title: armbian/build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/armbian/build
Language: shell
The official build framework for the Armbian Linux distribution. This repository contains the complete toolchain and scripts required to compile custom OS images from source, including kernel configuration, U-Boot handling, and board-specific tweaks for various ARM and ARM64 single-board computers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/copilot-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/copilot-cli
Language: shell
GitHub Copilot CLI brings the power of Copilot coding agent directly to your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/oss-fuzz
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/oss-fuzz
Language: shell
OSS-Fuzz - continuous fuzzing for open source software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: home-assistant/addons
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/home-assistant/addons
Language: shell
➕ Docker add-ons for Home Assistant

ns0:entry.ns0:title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
Language: shell
Supports running Armbian on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: termux/termux-packages
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/termux/termux-packages
Language: shell
A package build system for Termux.
